config.description: Defines the device status config properties.

endpoints.description: Defines the device status for inbound/outbound endpoints.

error.description: Defines the error related to this endpoint.

DeviceStatusEndpoints.description: Defines the device status for inbound/outbound endpoints.

inbound.description: KeyValue pair representing status of inbound endpoints.

Error.description: Defines the error object with properties.

code.description: Error code for classification of errors (ex: '400', '404', '500', etc.).

message.description: Human-readable helpful error message to provide additional context for error (e.g.,: “Capability ID 'foo' does not exist”).

details.description: Array of error details that describe the status of each error.

code.description: Multi-part error code for classification and root causing of errors (ex: 400.200.100.432).

message.description: Human-readable helpful error message to provide additional context for error (ex: “Authentication method not supported”).

info.description: Human-readable helpful detailed text context for debugging (ex: “The following mechanisms are supported...”).

correlationId.description: Unique identifier for the transaction to aid in debugging.

HostAuthentication.description: Definition of the client authentication mechanism to the host.

method.description: Defines the method to authenticate the user of the client at the server.

values.name: Anonymous
values.description: The user authentication method is anonymous.

values.name: Certificate
values.description: The user authentication method is an x509 certificate.

values.name: UsernamePassword
values.description: The user authentication method is a username and password.

usernamePasswordCredentials.description: Defines the username and password references when UsernamePassword user authentication mode is selected.

x509Credentials.description: Defines the certificate reference when Certificate user authentication mode is selected.

InboundEndpoints.description: An endpoint to connect to the device.

address.description: The endpoint address & port. This can be either an IP address (e.g., 192.168.1.1) or a fully qualified domain name (FQDN, e.g., server.example.com).

version.description: Protocol version associated with the endpoint e.g. 1 or 2 for endpointType Microsoft.HTTP, and 3.5 or 5.0 for endpointType Microsoft.Mqtt etc.

authentication.description: Defines the client authentication mechanism to the server.

trustSettings.description: Defines server trust settings for the endpoint.

additionalConfiguration.description: Stringified JSON that contains configuration to be used by the connector (e.g., OPC UA, ONVIF).

InboundEndpointsUpdate.description: An endpoint to connect to the device.

address.description: The endpoint address & port. This can be either an IP address (e.g., 192.168.1.1) or a fully qualified domain name (FQDN, e.g., server.example.com).

authentication.description: Defines the client authentication mechanism to the server.

trustSettings.description: Defines server trust settings for the endpoint.

additionalConfiguration.description: Stringified JSON that contains configuration to be used by the connector (e.g., OPC UA, ONVIF).

value.description: The NamespaceDevice items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

uuid.description: A unique identifier for the device.

enabled.description: Indicates if the resource is enabled or not.

externalDeviceId.description: The Device ID provided by the customer.

discoveredDeviceRef.description: Reference to a device. Populated only if the device had been created from discovery flow. Discovered device name must be provided.

endpoints.description: Property bag containing the device's unassigned and assigned endpoints.

attributes.description: A set of key-value pairs that contain custom attributes set by the customer.

version.description: An integer that is incremented each time the resource is modified.

lastTransitionTime.description: A timestamp (in UTC) that is updated each time the resource is modified.

NamespaceDeviceUpdate.description: The type used for update operations of the NamespaceDevice.

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

NamespaceDeviceUpdateProperties.description: The updatable properties of the NamespaceDevice.

version.description: A read-only incremental counter indicating the number of times the configuration has been modified from the perspective of the current actual (edge) state of the CRD. Edge would be the only writer of this value and would sync back up to the cloud. In steady state, this should equal version.

lastTransitionTime.description: A read-only timestamp indicating the last time the configuration has been modified from the perspective of the current actual (edge) state of the CRD. Edge would be the only writer of this value and would sync back up to the cloud.

error.description: Object to transfer and persist errors that originate from the edge.

StatusError.description: Defines the status config error properties.

code.description: Error code for classification of errors (ex: '400', '404', '500', etc.).

message.description: Human-readable helpful error message to provide additional context for error (e.g.,: “Capability ID 'foo' does not exist”).

details.description: Array of error details that describe the status of each error.

TrustSettings.description: Defines server trust settings for an endpoint.

trustList.description: Defines a secret reference for certificates to trust.

usernameSecretName.description: The name of the secret containing the username.

passwordSecretName.description: The name of the secret containing the password.

usernameSecretName.description: The name of the secret containing the username.

passwordSecretName.description: The name of the secret containing the password.

X509CertificateCredentials.description: The x509 certificate for authentication mode Certificate.

certificateSecretName.description: The name of the secret containing the certificate and private key (e.g. stored as .der/.pem or .der/.pfx).

keySecretName.description: The name of the secret containing the certificate private key in PEM or DER format.

intermediateCertificatesSecretName.description: The name of the secret containing the combined intermediate certificates in PEM format.

certificateSecretName.description: The name of the secret containing the certificate and private key (e.g. stored as .der/.pem or .der/.pfx).

keySecretName.description: The name of the secret containing the certificate private key in PEM or DER format.

intermediateCertificatesSecretName.description: The name of the secret containing the combined intermediate certificates in PEM format.
